You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a book, a potion recipe, a pillow, a wardrobe and a bed. The book is on the bed. The potion recipe is on the bed. The pillow is on the floor. The wardrobe is closed. There is a passage to a reading room here.
> take potion recipe
You take the potion recipe. In your inventory you have a potion recipe.
> read potion recipe

You read the potion recipe:
That odd potion
Ingredients: Ectoplasm, spiderweb, nightshade, lily of the valley.
1. Pour ectoplasm into your cauldron.
2. Add the lily of the valley into your cauldron.
3. Put the spiderweb into your cauldron.
4. Wiggle a zulpowand at your cauldron.
5. Wiggle a ice wand on your cauldron.
6. Put the nightshade into your cauldron.
> look under pillow
I don't know what 'under pillow' means.
> move pillow
You can't go to a pillow from here.
> examine pillow
This is a pillow. The pillow is on. The pillow is on the floor. The pillow is takeable.
> take pillow
You take the pillow. In your inventory you have a pillow and a potion recipe.
> open wardrobe
The wardrobe is now open. The wardrobe is empty.
> go to reading room
You are in a reading room now. There are a side table, a shelf, a couch, a table and a chair. There are passages to a garden and a conservatory here.
> examine shelf
This is a shelf. There is nothing on the shelf.
> examine side table
This is a side table. There is nothing on the side table.
> examine table
This is a table. There is nothing on the table.
> go to garden

You are in a garden now. There are a lily of the valley, a nightshade, a bucket of water and a garden bench. The lily of the valley is on the floor. The nightshade is on the floor. The bucket of water is on the floor. There are passages to a storage room and a outhouse here.
> drop pillow
You drop the pillow on the floor.
> take lily of the valley
You take the lily of the valley. In your inventory you have a potion recipe and a lily of the valley.
> drop potion recipe
You drop the potion recipe on the floor.
> take nightshade
You take the nightshade. In your inventory you have a nightshade and a lily of the valley.
